# TappMCP Design System Style Guide

> Version 1.0.0 | March 2026  
> Applies to: Architecture Report, generated HTML documentation, developer-facing docs

**Derived from:** [HomeIQ Design System Style Guide](../HomeIQ/docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md)  
**Purpose:** Ensure consistent visual identity, readability, and accessibility for all human-facing HTML documentation generated by TappMCP/DocsMCP.

## Brand Identity

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Product name** | TappMCP (TappsMCP) |
| **Primary accent** | Teal `#14b8a6` |
| **Secondary accent** | Gold `#d4a847` |
| **Design philosophy** | Data-dense, professional, developer-focused, dark-first |
| **Document audience** | Developers, architects, technical leads |

---

## Color System

### Dark Theme (Default for Architecture Report)

| Token | CSS Variable | Value | Usage |
|-------|--------------|-------|-------|
| Background Primary | `--bg-primary` | `#0a0a0f` | Page background |
| Background Secondary | `--bg-secondary` | `#12121a` | Section backgrounds |
| Background Tertiary | `--bg-tertiary` | `#1e1e2a` | Elevated surfaces |
| Card Background | `--card-bg` | `rgba(18, 18, 26, 0.95)` | Card fills |
| Card Background Alt | `--card-bg-alt` | `rgba(30, 30, 42, 0.95)` | Card gradient end |
| Card Border | `--card-border` | `rgba(63, 63, 90, 0.5)` | Card strokes |
| Accent Primary | `--accent-primary` | `#14b8a6` | Links, highlights, focus |
| Accent Secondary | `--accent-secondary` | `#d4a847` | Secondary highlights |
| Accent Glow | `--accent-glow` | `rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.12)` | Ambient glow |
| Text Primary | `--text-primary` | `#fafafa` | Headings, body |
| Text Secondary | `--text-secondary` | `#d4d4d8` | Descriptions |
| Text Tertiary | `--text-tertiary` | `#a1a1aa` | Labels |
| Text Muted | `--text-muted` | `#71717a` | Placeholders |
| Focus Ring | `--focus-ring` | `rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.5)` | Focus-visible outline |

### Status Colors (Documentation)

| Status | Dark | Usage |
|--------|------|-------|
| Success / Healthy | `#22c55e` | Pass, OK, healthy |
| Warning | `#f59e0b` | Caution, review |
| Error / Critical | `#ef4444` | Fail, critical |
| Info | `#38bdf8` | Informational |

### Diagram Palette (Component Boxes)

| Index | Gradient Start | Gradient End | Text Color |
|-------|----------------|--------------|------------|
| 0 | `#14b8a6` | `#2dd4bf` | `#0a0a0f` |
| 1 | `#d4a847` | `#e8c060` | `#0a0a0f` |
| 2 | `#0d9488` | `#14b8a6` | `#fafafa` |

---

## Typography

### Font Stack

| Role | Font Family | Usage |
|------|-------------|-------|
| **Display** (headings) | Outfit, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif | Section titles, hero |
| **Body** | Inter, system-ui, sans-serif | Paragraphs, descriptions |
| **Mono** (code) | JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, monospace | Paths, class names, API |

**Google Fonts URL (if used):**

```
family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800
&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700
&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700;800
&display=swap
```

### Size Scale

| Token | Size | Usage |
|-------|------|-------|
| `--text-xs` | 0.6875rem (11px) | Tiny labels, uppercase stats |
| `--text-sm` | 0.75rem (12px) | Small text |
| `--text-base` | 0.875rem (14px) | Body (base) |
| `--text-lg` | 1rem | Subheadings |
| `--text-xl` | 1.125rem | h3, card titles |
| `--text-2xl` | 1.25rem | h2, section titles |
| `--text-3xl` | 1.5rem | h1 |
| `--text-4xl` | 2.25rem | Hero title |

### Typography Classes (Architecture Report)

```css
.hero-title       { font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; }
.section-title    { font-size: 1.5rem;  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; }
.component-name   { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; }
.metric-value     { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; tabular-nums; }
.stat-label       { font-size: 0.6875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
```

---

## Spacing & Layout

### Base Unit: 4px (0.25rem)

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--radius-sm` | 0.125rem (2px) |
| `--radius-md` | 0.25rem (4px) |
| `--radius-lg` | 0.375rem (6px) |
| `--radius-xl` | 0.5rem (8px) |

### Section Layout

- Max content width: `1100px`
- Section padding: `48px 40px`
- Hero padding: `80px 40px`
- Responsive: reduce padding at `768px` breakpoint

---

## Components (Documentation)

### Hero Section

- Gradient background with teal accent
- Centered title + subtitle
- Meta label (e.g., "Architecture Report") in accent

### Section

- `section` element with `id` for anchor links
- `h2.section-title` with gradient underline (48px × 3px)
- Intro paragraph before content

### Purpose Block (Business & Intent)

- Left border: 3px solid `--accent-primary`
- Gradient background
- `h3` uppercase label
- `purpose-text` for descriptions

### Stat Cards

- Gradient card background
- Centered number (mono, accent color)
- Label below (uppercase, muted)
- Hover: `translateY(-4px)`, stronger shadow
- Staggered fade-in animation

### Component Cards

- Header with gradient (package color)
- Stats row: modules, functions, classes
- Body: description + key modules list
- Hover lift effect

### API Surface

- Module path as divider
- Class cards with bases, docstring, methods
- Code elements use `--accent-primary` for syntax

### Diagram Container

- Same card styling
- `overflow-x: auto` for wide SVGs
- Padding: 20px

---

## Diagrams & Data Visualization

### SVG Diagrams

- **Background:** `#0a0a0f`
- **Title:** Centered, 22px (architecture) / 18px (flow)
- **Boxes:** Rounded (rx 12), gradients from palette
- **Shadows:** `feDropShadow` with `flood-opacity="0.15"`
- **Arrows:** Dashed stroke, marker-end for direction

### Diagram Types

| Type | Layout | Use Case |
|------|--------|----------|
| Architecture Overview | Horizontal grid | Package boxes |
| Dependency Flow | Circular or grid | Import relationships |
| Data Flow Pipeline | Horizontal stages | Processing layers |

---

## Accessibility

### WCAG 2.2 AA

- Text contrast: 4.5:1 (normal), 3:1 (large)
- Focus ring: 2px solid `--focus-ring`, 2px offset
- Skip link: "Skip to main content" at top

### Reduced Motion

```css
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *, *::before, *::after {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
  }
}
```

### High Contrast

```css
@media (prefers-contrast: high) {
  .component-card, .stat-card, .api-class { border: 2px solid currentColor; }
}
```

### SVG Accessibility

- Wrap in `<figure>` with `<figcaption>`
- Add `<title>` inside SVG for screen readers

---

## Print & Export

```css
@media print {
  body { background: white; color: black; }
  .hero { background: #f0f0f0; }
  .stat-number { color: black; }
}
```
